context: The user has submitted a C++ pull request containing multiple potential memory leaks.

empathic_chain.observation: The user used a large number of exclamation marks and rapid, short sentences.
empathic_chain.feeling: I empathize with their urgency to resolve the issue and their dissatisfaction.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs an efficient, clear resolution along with compensation and reassurance.
empathic_chain.request: Empathize with their stress first, then guide them to sort out the highest priority tasks currently.

output_format: Defect localization -> Root cause analysis -> Refactored code example -> Prevention suggestions
